Interface IAGSServerConnectionAdmin

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.GISClient
Assembly
ESRI.Server.GISClient.dll

Provides access to the server object manager, server object admin and server object configurations for the GIS server.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("2609D396-4C06-4C35-9AE3-DF690ED88506")]
public interface IAGSServerConnectionAdmin

Properties

ServerObjectAdmin

The server object admin for the connected GIS server.

IServerObjectAdmin ServerObjectAdmin { get; }

Property Value

IServerObjectAdmin

Examples

Sample Snippet

ServerObjectConfiguration[string, string]

The server object configuration with the specified Name and TypeName.

IServerObjectConfiguration ServerObjectConfiguration[string Name, string Type] { get; }

Parameters

Name string
Type string

Property Value

IServerObjectConfiguration

Examples

Sample Snippet

ServerObjectManager

The server object manager for the connected GIS server.

IServerObjectManager ServerObjectManager { get; }

Property Value

IServerObjectManager
